description: 70 in x 68 in floor arena (1778x1727mm); four corner AprilTags, each 4.5 in from nearest wall

tags.description: Bottom-left corner, facing east (heading 0); 4.5 in from left wall, on south wall
Bottom-right corner, facing north (heading 90); on east wall, 4.5 in from south wall
Top-right corner, facing west (heading 180); 4.5 in from right wall, on north wall
Top-left corner, facing south (heading 270); on west wall, 4.5 in from north wall
